data.name: SECRET HORNY SANTA
data.detailed_description:
You play the role of Santa, who has to fulfill all the hottest and sexiest dreams of women.

In the game you will find:
- One-handed play
- Exciting sexy stories
- 5 amazing girls
- Achievements
- A gallery of the hottest photos

Go on a New Year's adventure together with the game SECRET HORNY SANTA.

data.short_description: SECRET HORNY SANTA is a visual novel for adults where you will realize the dreams of sexy girls.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 428 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 428 MB 可用空間
